Data Analyst & OMSA Candidate

Shehzan
Warraich

Building forecasting models, analytics pipelines, and the interfaces that surface them — from raw data to decisions.

View Work About Me
prophet_model.py 
>>> m = Prophet(seasonality_mode='multiplicative')
>>> m.fit(df_train)  # 730d of daily demand

>>> future = m.make_future_dataframe(periods=90)
>>> fc    = m.predict(future)

>>> mape = mean_absolute_percentage_error(
...     y_true, fc.tail(30)['yhat']
... )
>>> print(f"MAPE: {mape:.1%}")
MAPE: 4.3%

Predictive Modeling & Regression

Developed models for complex regression and classification tasks using Ridge/Lasso regularization and tree-based ensemble methods.

Machine Learning Implementations

Implemented core ML algorithms from scratch including PCA, K-Means Clustering, and SVMs to analyze computational performance and deepen algorithmic intuition.

Writing

All articles →
  • April 1, 2025 · 9 min read

    Building a Reproducible Analytics Pipeline with dbt and Snowflake

    A walkthrough of how I structured a mid-market SaaS company's transformation layer using dbt's staging-intermediate-marts pattern, and the schema tests that caught three production bugs before they reached a single dashboard.

    dbtSnowflakeData Engineering
  • March 13, 2025 · 7 min read

    Why Bayesian Inference Changed How I Think About A/B Tests

    Most A/B testing frameworks hand you a p-value and a binary verdict. Bayesian methods hand you a probability distribution over outcomes — and that changes everything about how you communicate experiment results to stakeholders.

    StatisticsExperimentationBayesian Methods
